LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER TOTAL CAR FRANCHISING CORPORATION'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077
